findings: Google open-sourced Scion (April 2026) - an experimental agent orchestration testbed for building and testing multi-agent AI systems. Relevant for AI agent workflow development.
Jason AI v3.6 released - B2B sales outreach AI now featuring technographic targeting (companies based on existing tech stack) and LinkedIn intent signals. Useful for AI-driven sales/marketing tools.
MojoMake AI Image-to-Video Generator launched - supports 100+ effects, multi-model access in one account. Example of converging AI generation tools.
